creator: tps@vr-web.de
text:
Created attachment 146890
log of "cd /usr/ports/lang/gcc; make clean build"

Have gcc47, gcc48, gcc49 installed, then upgrade using "portupgrade -af" all three will fail to compile with errors:

/usr/ports/lang/gcc/work/build/./gcc/include-fixed/stdlib.h:99:1: error: '_Noreturn' does not name a type
